creator: carlos.paniago@gmail.com
text:
the port in security/openvpn is going from 2.0.6 to 2.0.9 in the site
http://openvpn.net/

Fix: Aplly the patch to Makefile and distinfo and compile again (make).

cd /usr/ports/security/openvpn
patch <openvpn.txt
make
make deinstall install clean



Patch attached with submission follows:
